description: Capability-level dependency graph for designing a post-disaster civilization reconstruction handbook. Nodes are repeatable capabilities, not school subjects or isolated inventions.
design_rule: Theory appears at the first capability that needs it. Nodes are sorted by practical prerequisites, quality gates, and scale requirements.

edge_types.meaning: Cannot credibly perform the target capability without this prior capability.
Crude version may exist, but reliable/repeatable operation requires this dependency.
Small-scale proof works before this, but settlement/industrial scale requires it.
Capability is dangerous or self-defeating unless this safety/health/control node exists.
Requires records, training, standards, law, inspection, or role separation.
Can be initially acquired by salvage, but must later be repairable and reproducible.

bands.name: Triage, archive, and salvage
bands.goal: Keep people alive, keep knowledge alive, and preserve reusable artifacts.

bands.name: Clean survival
bands.goal: Water, sanitation, calories, shelter, hygiene, and disease suppression.

bands.name: Stable settlement
bands.goal: Food systems, storage, construction, local transport, and craft specialization.

bands.name: Controlled heat and primary materials
bands.goal: Fuel concentration, kilns, ceramics, lime, refractories, glass, and primary metals.

bands.name: Measurement and repeatability
bands.goal: Units, gauges, balances, records, calibration, inspection, and replaceable parts.

bands.name: Mechanical power and pressure
bands.goal: Mills, pumps, shafts, gears, bearings, machine tools, boilers, and engines.

bands.name: Industrial chemistry and health systems
bands.goal: Laboratories, separations, reagents, public health, sterile work, fertilizers, and medicines.

bands.name: Electrification
bands.goal: Conductors, magnets, generation, motors, distribution, batteries, and electrical measurement.

bands.name: Communications, control, and computing
bands.goal: Telegraph, relay logic, radio, vacuum electronics, automation, and early computation.

bands.name: Advanced clean and nuclear regimes
bands.goal: Semiconductor fabrication, high-reliability infrastructure, nuclear governance, fuel cycle, and reactor power.

spines.name: Knowledge preservation, teaching, and document control
Hygiene, contamination control, waste, and sterility
Maintenance, repair, inspection, and failure analysis
Governance, licensing, role separation, and training
Salvage, repair, copy, and replacement ladder

nodes.name: Durable knowledge archive and copying loop
nodes.mission: Preserve the map of civilization and create a routine for copying, teaching, and correcting it.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Protected archive; master index; copy protocol; apprenticeship list.

nodes.name: Training, apprenticeship, and skill certification
nodes.mission: Prevent skill extinction by pairing written knowledge with repeated practice and role handoff.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Named instructors, learners, skill checklists, and practical demonstrations.

nodes.name: Counting, writing, ledgers, and controlled records
nodes.mission: Make inventories, recipes, maintenance, epidemiology, calibration, and governance possible.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Ledger system, inventory marks, dates, quantities, and controlled procedure sheets.

nodes.name: Salvage survey, preservation, repair, and reverse engineering
nodes.mission: Exploit surviving artifacts without confusing salvage with long-term manufacturing capability.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Inventory of reusable tools, parts, machines, books, seeds, medicines, wire, optics, engines, and instruments.

nodes.name: Cutting edges and hand tool basics
nodes.mission: Shape wood, fiber, hide, food, earth, and later metal with controlled cutting.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Knives, scrapers, axes, wedges, awls, drills, and sharpening routine.

nodes.name: Cordage, knots, nets, weaving, and textiles
nodes.mission: Bind structures, catch food, carry loads, make clothing, transmit force, and build early machines.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Rope, twine, knots, nets, woven cloth or mats.

nodes.name: Basic containers, closures, and storage discipline
nodes.mission: Store water, food, seed, fuel, medicines, and later reagents without loss or contamination.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Baskets, bags, skins, wooden boxes, simple lids, labels, and clean storage areas.

nodes.name: Controlled fire, cooking, boiling, and heat discipline
nodes.mission: Control heat for warmth, food safety, water treatment, drying, and the first material transformations.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Safe hearths, fuel drying, boiling practice, cooking, drying, ash management.

nodes.name: Protected water sourcing and potable treatment
nodes.mission: Make drinking water reliably safe and prevent recontamination.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Protected source, boiling or disinfection routine, settling/filtration, covered storage.

nodes.name: Sanitation, excreta isolation, drainage, and waste streams
nodes.mission: Stop settlements from poisoning themselves through waste, flies, runoff, and contaminated hands.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Latrines, handwashing points, drainage, waste separation, burial/burning/composting rules.

nodes.name: Soap, cleaning agents, and routine hygiene
nodes.mission: Reduce pathogen transfer and prepare the contamination-control mindset needed by medicine and laboratories.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Soap or alkaline cleaner, handwashing routine, cleaned tools, laundry practice.

nodes.name: Food calories, preservation, and spoilage control
nodes.mission: Create predictable calories beyond immediate foraging or harvest.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Drying, salting/brining where available, smoking, fermentation, granary or root cellar.

nodes.name: Seed systems, crop calendars, and genetic preservation
nodes.mission: Maintain viable seed stock and crop diversity across bad seasons.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Dry labeled seed stores, germination tests, crop calendar, seed exchange rules.

nodes.name: Field agriculture, soil-water management, and crop rotation
nodes.mission: Turn seed stock, land, water, labor, and records into reliable harvests.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Fields, irrigation/drainage basics, soil amendments, crop rotation, harvest calendar.

nodes.name: Shelter, clothing, thermal protection, and weatherproofing
nodes.mission: Reduce exposure, preserve labor health, and protect stores and workshops.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Weatherproof shelters, bedding, clothing, insulation, ventilation.

nodes.name: Simple machines and hand-force amplification
nodes.mission: Multiply human force for digging, lifting, splitting, hauling, pressing, and construction.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Lever, wedge, wheel-and-axle, pulley, inclined plane, screw, press.

nodes.name: Woodworking, joinery, frames, and local transport
nodes.mission: Build durable structures, carts, frames, benches, waterwheels, and machine supports.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Sawn/shaped timber, joints, frames, carts, handles, benches.

nodes.name: Masonry, earthworks, roads, drainage, and settlement layout
nodes.mission: Stabilize settlement space: roads, drains, foundations, walls, workshops, storage, and hazard zoning.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Drainage plan, raised roads, foundations, walls, protected workshops.

nodes.name: Settlement planning, roles, stores, and local logistics
nodes.mission: Coordinate people, work, food, waste, workshops, safety zones, and transport.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Settlement map, roles, stores ledger, shift routines, hazard zoning.

nodes.name: Animal traction, manure management, and husbandry
nodes.mission: Multiply agricultural and transport labor while managing feed, disease, and manure.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Draft animals, harnesses, manure collection, breeding and feeding records.

nodes.name: Fuel concentration, charcoal, coke pathway, and draft control
nodes.mission: Turn diffuse biomass or fossil fuel into high-temperature process fuel.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Charcoal kiln or pit, fuel grading, draft control, ash/char handling.

nodes.name: Kilns, furnaces, bellows, and high-temperature work
nodes.mission: Make heat intense, directional, repeatable, and enclosed.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Kiln/furnace body, bellows or draft, firing schedule, heat zones.

nodes.name: Ceramics, pottery, brick, molds, and refractories
nodes.mission: Create durable heat-resistant containers, bricks, pipes, molds, and furnace linings.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Fired pots, bricks, tiles, pipes, crucibles, molds, refractory lining.

depends_on.note: Repeatable firing and recipes require units.

nodes.name: Lime, mortar, plaster, clinker, and cement ladder
nodes.mission: Make mineral binders for durable buildings, sanitation works, furnaces, roads, and later containment.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Burned lime, slaked lime, mortar, plaster, improved cement where possible.

nodes.name: Salt, brine, preservation, electrolyte, and chlor-alkali precursor
nodes.mission: Use salt as a preservation tool, process ingredient, and later chemical feedstock.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Salt collection/refining, brine strength checks, dry storage, preserved foods.

nodes.name: Mining, quarrying, pits, ventilation, and mineral access
nodes.mission: Extract ore, flux, stone, clay, coal, salt, and aggregates at useful scale.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Safe pits/quarries, hauling, sorting areas, ventilation or open-cut rules.

nodes.name: Ore preparation, crushing, sorting, washing, fluxing, and assay basics
nodes.mission: Transform mined material into predictable furnace charges.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Crushed/sorted ore, flux recipe, charcoal/ore ratio, simple assay notes.

nodes.name: Copper, bronze, lead, tin, zinc, and nonferrous metalworking
nodes.mission: Obtain workable metals for castings, alloys, solder, pipes, bearings, and electrical conductors.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Smelted/cast copper or bronze; simple refining; drawn or hammered stock.

nodes.name: Bloomery iron and forge welding
nodes.mission: Make workable iron before full industrial steel control.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Iron bloom, forge, hammering, slag removal, wrought iron tools.

nodes.name: Glass, lenses, sealed vessels, and basic labware
nodes.mission: Create transparent, chemically useful, sealable vessels and optical blanks.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Glass vessels, windows, simple lenses, retorts, tubing, sealed containers.

nodes.name: Reference units, dimensions, mass, volume, and time
nodes.mission: Create shared quantities so recipes, tools, maps, structures, and experiments can be repeated.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Length, mass, volume, temperature proxies, timekeeping, reference artifacts.

nodes.name: Balances, gauges, calibration chains, and inspection
nodes.mission: Turn measurement into traceable, comparable, quality-controlled practice.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Balances, calipers/gauges, pressure/temperature indicators where available, calibration logs.

nodes.name: Paper, ink, copying, printing, and diagram reproduction
nodes.mission: Mass-produce knowledge, labels, records, maps, technical drawings, and instructions.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Paper or equivalent, ink, reproducible diagrams, printing or duplicating process.

nodes.name: Governance, standards, quality systems, and role separation
nodes.mission: Create institutions that keep high-risk systems from depending on memory, charisma, or one expert.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Standards board, inspection roles, procedure control, incident reporting, dispute process.

nodes.name: Waterwheels, windmills, mills, and site-bound rotary power
nodes.mission: Convert natural flows into grinding, pumping, sawing, hammering, and workshop power.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Waterwheel or windmill; grain mill; shafted workshop power.

nodes.name: Shafts, gears, bearings, cams, cranks, and transmissions
nodes.mission: Transmit and transform rotary motion into controlled work.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Shafts, simple gears, bushings/bearings, cranks, cams, couplings.

nodes.name: Pumps, hydraulics, pipe systems, and fluid handling
nodes.mission: Move water, brine, fuel, air, sewage, and process fluids under control.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Hand/animal/water-powered pumps, valves, pipes, cisterns, drainage lifts.

nodes.name: Steelmaking, carbon control, heat treatment, and alloy ladder
nodes.mission: Produce strong, predictable ferrous materials for tools, machines, pressure systems, and structures.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Controlled steel stock, hardened/tempered tools, known heat-treatment recipes.

nodes.name: Machine tools, fixtures, jigs, surface plates, and precision reproduction
nodes.mission: Make accurate parts that can reproduce better tools and machines.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Lathe, drill press, planer/mill equivalent, fixtures, surface/reference practices.

nodes.name: Interchangeable parts, fasteners, fits, and maintenance economy
nodes.mission: Shift from one-off craft to replaceable assemblies and scalable repair.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Standard fasteners, fits/classes, part drawings, spares bins, acceptance gauges.

nodes.name: Boilers, pressure vessels, condensers, and steam systems
nodes.mission: Use contained pressure and phase change to move heat and power at high density.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Boiler with pressure gauge/relief, condenser where applicable, valves, operating rules.

nodes.name: Steam engines, turbines, and non-site-bound mechanical power
nodes.mission: Convert heat into continuous rotary or reciprocating power independent of rivers or wind.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Steam engine or turbine, governor/control, drivetrain, maintenance schedule.

nodes.name: Roads, canals, ships, navigation, and freight logistics
nodes.mission: Move food, ore, people, tools, and information between specialized settlements.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Road/canal/boat network, maps, schedules, load standards, repair depots.

nodes.name: Maps, calendars, surveying, and practical navigation
nodes.mission: Know where things are, when to plant, how to travel, and how to coordinate work.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Local maps, seasonal calendar, survey marks, route notes, basic navigation.

nodes.name: Optics, lens grinding, microscopy, and optical inspection
nodes.mission: See small structures, inspect materials, and diagnose biological contamination.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Magnifiers, compound microscope, illumination, slide/stain workflow.

nodes.name: Analytical chemistry, separations, assays, and reagent control
nodes.mission: Measure substances well enough to control water, metals, medicine, fertilizer, and industry.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Distillation, filtration, titration, pH/acid-base work, gravimetry, assay records.

nodes.name: Industrial chemicals, acids, alkalis, solvents, water treatment chemicals
nodes.mission: Make chemicals as infrastructure: cleaning, water treatment, metallurgy, fertilizer, textiles, medicine.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Controlled acid/alkali production, disinfectants/coagulants, gas handling, waste controls.

nodes.name: Fertilizers, nutrient accounting, and industrial agriculture inputs
nodes.mission: Stabilize high-yield agriculture by replacing depleted nutrients and tracking soil needs.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Compost/manure protocols, lime use, mineral amendments, then nitrogen/phosphate/potash production routes.

nodes.name: Public health, diagnosis, surveillance, and outbreak control
nodes.mission: Turn sanitation, records, microscopy, and statistics into population-scale disease control.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Case logs, diagnostic routines, outbreak maps, quarantine/isolation rules, lab quality checks.

nodes.name: Sterilization, asepsis, clean rooms/zones, and contamination control
nodes.mission: Make surgery, injectable medicine, lab work, and later clean manufacturing possible.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Boiling/steam/dry heat sterilization, sterile handling zones, filters where available, environmental monitoring.

nodes.name: Medicines, sterile products, batch records, and clinical reliability
nodes.mission: Produce and evaluate reliable medicines instead of relying on anecdote or contaminated batches.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Controlled formulations, batch records, sterility checks where needed, clinical comparison records.

nodes.name: Refrigeration, cold chain, and controlled atmospheres
nodes.mission: Preserve food, vaccines/medicines, biological samples, and industrial processes.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Ice/cold storage first, then mechanical refrigeration, temperature logs, cold transport.

nodes.name: Population support, maternal care, nutrition, and demographic resilience
nodes.mission: Keep enough healthy people alive to maintain specialization and multi-generation progress.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Maternal/infant care routines, nutrition plans, vaccination where possible, workforce health records.

nodes.name: Conductive metals, insulation, magnets, and electrical safety materials
nodes.mission: Prepare materials needed for reliable circuits, coils, motors, generators, and grids.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Copper or suitable conductors, insulation, magnetic iron/steel, switches, fuses.

nodes.name: Batteries, electrochemistry, plating, and portable electrical sources
nodes.mission: Store and use electrical energy for communication, instruments, lighting, and electrochemical processing.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Primary cells, rechargeable cells where possible, plating baths, safe electrolyte handling.

nodes.name: Electrical generation, motors, dynamos, and electrical measurement
nodes.mission: Convert mechanical power into electricity and electricity back into useful motion.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Generator/dynamo, motor, switchgear, basic voltage/current measurement, grounding routine.

nodes.name: Local grids, transformers, protection, and electrical service discipline
nodes.mission: Make electricity into civil infrastructure instead of isolated machines.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Local grid, transformers if available, substations/switchyards, breakers/fuses, service maps.

nodes.name: Telegraph, relays, electromechanical control, and early communication
nodes.mission: Transmit information faster than transport and automate switching/control with repairable parts.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Telegraph/telephone line, relays, switches, signal codes, control cabinets.

nodes.name: Radio, vacuum tubes, amplification, and analog electronics
nodes.mission: Use electromagnetic waves and electronic amplification before semiconductor fabrication exists.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Vacuum tubes, radio transmitter/receiver, amplifiers, oscillators, test benches.

nodes.name: Control systems, mechanical/relay computing, feedback, and automation
nodes.mission: Make systems self-regulating and make calculation/control repeatable.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Governors, thermostats, relay logic, tabulators, analog calculators, control diagrams.

nodes.name: Semiconductor materials, clean fabrication, lithography, and microelectronics
nodes.mission: Build high-density electronics only after purity, metrology, clean environments, and power are mature.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Pure semiconductor material, clean processing area, patterning/etch/doping route, device inspection.

nodes.name: Digital computing, networks, databases, and software preservation
nodes.mission: Use computation to preserve knowledge, optimize logistics, model systems, and control complex infrastructure.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Computers, networks, databases, reproducible software, backups, cybersecurity/basic access rules.

nodes.name: Nuclear governance, safeguards, workforce, grid readiness, and site program
nodes.mission: Create the institutional and infrastructure base for any civilian nuclear program.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Independent regulator, operator organization, trained workforce, safety culture, site/grid studies.

nodes.name: Nuclear fuel-cycle chemistry, ceramics, cladding, and qualification
nodes.mission: Provide qualified reactor fuel and materials under strict accounting and safety controls.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Fuel-cycle plan, qualified fuel form, cladding/materials program, accounting and waste controls.

nodes.name: Civil nuclear heat-to-power system
nodes.mission: Use controlled fission heat to make steam, drive turbines, and export electricity through a regulated grid.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Licensed reactor plant, cooling system, containment/civil works, trained operation, grid export.

nodes.name: Research universities, standards institutes, and continuous improvement loop
nodes.mission: Move beyond reconstruction into self-correcting scientific and industrial progress.
nodes.minimum_viable_output: Research institutions, standards labs, journals/peer review, funding/training loops, open technical archives.

edges.note: Repeatable firing and recipes require units.

priority_model.purpose: Help editors decide what to include first and how much detail each capability deserves.
priority_model.suggested_formula: priority = 2*survival_impact + 2*dependency_leverage + knowledge_fragility + difficulty_to_rederive + hazard_if_done_wrong - resource_accessibility_penalty - long_time_penalty
priority_model.rule: High hazard nodes need strong safety and institutional modules before recipes; high leverage nodes need diagrams, tests, and common failure modes.

module_template.capability_name: verb phrase: what society can reliably do
module_template.process_family: what class of process this belongs to
module_template.embedded_theory: only theory needed at point of use

critical_paths.interpretation: A reactor is not reached by physics alone. It is reached through extraction, heat, refractories, metals, measurement, machine tools, pressure systems, electricity, chemistry, health physics, governance, fuel qualification, and grid operation.
Serious chemistry starts when vessels, heat, glass, and measurement converge.
Industrial agriculture is basic farming plus seed quality, nutrient accounting, water control, chemistry, and pressure/gas handling.
Modern medicine is not just drugs. It begins with WASH, records, diagnosis, surveillance, contamination control, and batch quality.
Electricity is downstream of conductors, magnetic materials, rotary machinery, insulation, meters, and protection.
Useful electronics comes long before chip fabs; semiconductor work is a clean, high-purity, metrology-heavy summit.
